title: Phase-count contradiction: spec.md 'Phase 9 of 9' vs packet-root 14-phase map (010-014 already Complete)
claim: Phase 009 spec.md:54 asserts 'Phase 9 of 9' and L65 'Phase 9 of the Goal prompt offer'; packet-root spec.md:170-186 enumerates 14 phases with 010-014 all Complete and 009 as phase 9 of 14 Pending. '9 of 9' asserts a false total of 9; two docs in same packet disagree on phase count.
evidenceRefs: spec.md:65 (Phase 9 of the Goal prompt offer)
counterevidenceSought: reading under which '9 of 9' is correct -- folder is 9th child but 'of 9' asserts total=9; packet root explicitly lists 14 rows; no reconciling interpretation (likely stale from original 9-phase plan before 010-014 appended)
alternativeExplanation: template default enumeration never updated when remediation phases 010-014 added; defect lives in unfilled scaffold so carries no runtime weight, builder rewriting spec.md on pickup fixes naturally
scope: cross-doc factual contradiction inside unfilled scaffold
downgradeTrigger: spec.md authored on pickup (whole frontmatter/body rewritten)
upgradeTrigger: none (cannot become load-bearing for any runtime decision)

title: No concrete scope statement in any canonical doc; both spec.md and packet-root phase-map carry placeholders for phase 009 (handover.md is sole real source)
claim: Brief hypothesized packet-root phase map might describe phase 009 scope more concretely than phase 009 spec.md. Packet root IS concrete for 13 sibling phases but phase 009 is the lone blank row. Sole real scope = handover.md:96 + §2.1.
evidenceRefs: spec.md:67,70,73 ([To be defined during planning] x3)
counterevidenceSought: another packet-032 doc supplying phase 009 scope -- changelog repeats ownership claim not scope (seeded D2); did not find concrete scope statement outside handover.md in files read full (INFERRED-partial: full changelog read not performed this iteration)
alternativeExplanation: phased-decomposition parent designed to fill phase-map rows as children authored; phase 009 never got its row authored mirroring blank child spec -- pattern intentional, instance (009 blank) is the gap
scope: plan-completeness gap; builder has authoritative scope only in handover.md
downgradeTrigger: spec.md authored on pickup (handover scope promoted into spec)
upgradeTrigger: only if handover.md also lost/contradicted (then no scope anywhere) -- not the case
